Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*******************************************************************************

 Cocartesian objects

 We define the notions of cocartesian objects internal to arbitrary
 bicategories. This notion is defined dually to the notion of cartesian objects.
 For the representable definition, we work with initial objects and coproducts,
 and for the definition using adjunctions, we use left adjoints instead of right
 adjoints.

 Contents
 1. The representable definition of cocartesian objects
 2. Being cocartesian is a proposition
 3. The definitions of cocartesian objects via adjunctions
 4. Equivalence of the two definitions

 *******************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Initial.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Preservation.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat. Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.AdjointUnique.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.UnivalenceOp.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Adjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Limits.Final.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Limits.Products.

Local Open Scope cat.

(**
 1. The representable definition of cocartesian objects
 *)
Definition cocartesian_initial
           {B : bicat}
           (b : B)
  : UU
  := (∏ (x : B), Initial (hom x b))
     ×
     (∏ (x y : B) (f : x --> y), preserves_initial (pre_comp b f)).

Definition cocartesian_coprod
           {B : bicat}
           (b : B)
  : UU
  := (∏ (x : B), BinCoproducts (hom x b))
     ×
     (∏ (x y : B) (f : x --> y), preserves_bincoproduct (pre_comp b f)).

Definition cocartesian_ob
           {B : bicat}
           (b : B)
  : UU
  := cocartesian_initial b × cocartesian_coprod b.

(**
 2. Being cocartesian is a proposition
 *)

B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop (cocartesian_initial b)


B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop (cocartesian_initial b)

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop (∏ x : B, Initial (hom x b))
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop
  (∏ (x y : B) (f : B ⟦ x, y ⟧),
   preserves_initial (pre_comp b f))

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop (∏ x : B, Initial (hom x b))
 
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b, t: B
isofhlevel 1 ((λ t : B, Initial (hom t b)) t)

    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b, t: B
is_univalent (hom t b)

    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b, t: B
is_univalent_2_1 B

    exact HB.
  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop
  (∏ (x y : B) (f : B ⟦ x, y ⟧),
   preserves_initial (pre_comp b f))
 
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b, t, t0: B
t1: B ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t1 : B ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
    preserves_initial (pre_comp b t1)) t1)

    apply isaprop_preserves_initial.
Qed.


B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop (cocartesian_coprod b)


B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop (cocartesian_coprod b)

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop (∏ x : B, BinCoproducts (hom x b))
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop
  (∏ (x y : B) (f : B ⟦ x, y ⟧),
   preserves_bincoproduct (pre_comp b f))

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop (∏ x : B, BinCoproducts (hom x b))
 
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b, t: B
t0, t1: hom t b
isofhlevel 1 (BinCoproduct t0 t1)

    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b, t: B
t0, t1: hom t b
is_univalent (hom t b)

    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b, t: B
t0, t1: hom t b
is_univalent_2_1 B

    exact HB.
  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop
  (∏ (x y : B) (f : B ⟦ x, y ⟧),
   preserves_bincoproduct (pre_comp b f))
 
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b, t, t0: B
t1: B ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t1 : B ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
    preserves_bincoproduct (pre_comp b t1)) t1)

    apply isaprop_preserves_bincoproduct.
Qed.


B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop (cocartesian_ob b)


B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop (cocartesian_ob b)

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop (cocartesian_initial b)
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop (cocartesian_coprod b)

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop (cocartesian_initial b)
 
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
is_univalent_2_1 B

    exact HB.
  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop (cocartesian_coprod b)
 
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
is_univalent_2_1 B

    exact HB.
Qed.

(**
 3. The definitions of cocartesian objects via adjunctions
 *)
Section CocartesianViaAdjunction.
  Context {B : bicat}
          (b : B).

  Section TerminalAndInitial.
    Context (T : bifinal_obj B).

    Let f : b --> pr1 T
      := is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b.

    Definition cocartesian_initial_via_adj
      : UU
      := internal_right_adj f.

    
B: bicat
b: B
T: bifinal_obj B
f:= is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b: B ⟦ b, pr1 T ⟧
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
isaprop cocartesian_initial_via_adj

    
B: bicat
b: B
T: bifinal_obj B
f:= is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b: B ⟦ b, pr1 T ⟧
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
isaprop cocartesian_initial_via_adj

      
B: bicat
b: B
T: bifinal_obj B
f:= is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b: B ⟦ b, pr1 T ⟧
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
is_univalent_2_1 B

      exact HB.
    Qed.
  End TerminalAndInitial.

  Section ProdAndCoprod.
    Context (prod : has_binprod B).

    Let δ : b --> pr1 (prod b b)
      := binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b).

    Definition cocartesian_coprod_via_adj
      : UU
      := internal_right_adj δ.

    
B: bicat
b: B
prod: has_binprod B
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
isaprop cocartesian_coprod_via_adj

    
B: bicat
b: B
prod: has_binprod B
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
isaprop cocartesian_coprod_via_adj

      
B: bicat
b: B
prod: has_binprod B
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
is_univalent_2_1 B

      exact HB.
    Qed.
  End ProdAndCoprod.

  Section Cocartesian.
    Context (T : bifinal_obj B)
            (prod : has_binprod B).

    Definition cocartesian_ob_via_adj
      : UU
      := cocartesian_initial_via_adj T × cocartesian_coprod_via_adj prod.

    
B: bicat
b: B
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
isaprop cocartesian_ob_via_adj

    
B: bicat
b: B
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
isaprop cocartesian_ob_via_adj

      
B: bicat
b: B
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
isaprop (cocartesian_initial_via_adj T)
B: bicat
b: B
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
isaprop (cocartesian_coprod_via_adj prod)

      
B: bicat
b: B
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
isaprop (cocartesian_initial_via_adj T)
 
B: bicat
b: B
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
is_univalent_2_1 B

        exact HB.
      
B: bicat
b: B
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
isaprop (cocartesian_coprod_via_adj prod)
 
B: bicat
b: B
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
is_univalent_2_1 B

        exact HB.
    Qed.
  End Cocartesian.
End CocartesianViaAdjunction.

(**
 4. Equivalence of the two definitions
 *)
Section EquivalenceCocartesian.
  Context {B : bicat}
          (T : bifinal_obj B)
          (prod : has_binprod B)
          (b : B).

  Section ToAdj.
    Context (Hb : cocartesian_initial b).

    Let init : Initial (hom (pr1 T) b) := pr1 Hb (pr1 T).

    Let l : b --> pr1 T := is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b.
    Let r : pr1 T --> b := pr1 init.

    Local Definition cocartesian_initial_to_cocartesian_initial_via_adj_unit
      : id₁ (pr1 T) ==> r · l
      := is_bifinal_2cell_property (pr2 T) _ (id₁ _) (r · l).

    Let η : id₁ (pr1 T) ==> r · l
      := cocartesian_initial_to_cocartesian_initial_via_adj_unit.

    Local Definition cocartesian_initial_to_cocartesian_initial_via_adj_counit
      : l · r ==> id₁ b
      := InitialArrow (make_Initial _ (pr2 Hb _ _ l _ (pr2 init))) (id₁ b).

    Let ε : l · r ==> id₁ b
      := cocartesian_initial_to_cocartesian_initial_via_adj_counit.

    
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_initial b
init:= pr1 Hb (pr1 T): Initial (hom (pr1 T) b)
l:= is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b: B ⟦ b, pr1 T ⟧
r:= pr1 init: B ⟦ pr1 T, b ⟧
η:= cocartesian_initial_to_cocartesian_initial_via_adj_unit: id₁ (pr1 T) ==> r · l
ε:= cocartesian_initial_to_cocartesian_initial_via_adj_counit: l · r ==> id₁ b
cocartesian_initial_via_adj b T

    
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_initial b
init:= pr1 Hb (pr1 T): Initial (hom (pr1 T) b)
l:= is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b: B ⟦ b, pr1 T ⟧
r:= pr1 init: B ⟦ pr1 T, b ⟧
η:= cocartesian_initial_to_cocartesian_initial_via_adj_unit: id₁ (pr1 T) ==> r · l
ε:= cocartesian_initial_to_cocartesian_initial_via_adj_counit: l · r ==> id₁ b
cocartesian_initial_via_adj b T

T: bifinal_obj B

b: B
Hb: cocartesian_initial b
init:= pr1 Hb (pr1 T): Initial (hom (pr1 T) b)
l:= is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b: B ⟦ b, pr1 T ⟧
r:= pr1 init: B ⟦ pr1 T, b ⟧
η:= cocartesian_initial_to_cocartesian_initial_via_adj_unit: id₁ (pr1 T) ==> r · l
ε:= cocartesian_initial_to_cocartesian_initial_via_adj_counit: l · r ==> id₁ b
B ⟦ pr1 T, b ⟧

r:= pr1 init: B ⟦ pr1 T, b ⟧
η:= cocartesian_initial_to_cocartesian_initial_via_adj_unit: id₁ (pr1 T) ==> r · l
ε:= cocartesian_initial_to_cocartesian_initial_via_adj_counit: l · r ==> id₁ b
id₁ (pr1 T) ==>
?pr1 · is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_initial b
init:= pr1 Hb (pr1 T): Initial (hom (pr1 T) b)
l:= is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b: B ⟦ b, pr1 T ⟧
r:= pr1 init: B ⟦ pr1 T, b ⟧
η:= cocartesian_initial_to_cocartesian_initial_via_adj_unit: id₁ (pr1 T) ==> r · l
ε:= cocartesian_initial_to_cocartesian_initial_via_adj_counit: l · r ==> id₁ b
(λ _ : id₁ (pr1 T) ==>
       ?pr1 · is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b,
 is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b · ?pr1 ==> id₁ b)
  ?pr10
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_initial b
init:= pr1 Hb (pr1 T): Initial (hom (pr1 T) b)
l:= is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b: B ⟦ b, pr1 T ⟧
r:= pr1 init: B ⟦ pr1 T, b ⟧
η:= cocartesian_initial_to_cocartesian_initial_via_adj_unit: id₁ (pr1 T) ==> r · l
ε:= cocartesian_initial_to_cocartesian_initial_via_adj_counit: l · r ==> id₁ b
(((linvunitor
     (internal_right_adj_left_adjoint
        (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2))
   • (internal_right_adj_unit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2)
      ▹ internal_right_adj_left_adjoint
          (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2)))
  • rassociator
      (internal_right_adj_left_adjoint
         (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2))
      (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b)
      (internal_right_adj_left_adjoint
         (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2)))
 • (internal_right_adj_left_adjoint
      (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2)
    ◃ internal_right_adj_counit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2)))
• runitor
    (internal_right_adj_left_adjoint
       (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2)) =
id₂
  (internal_right_adj_left_adjoint
     (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2))

b: B

 (((rinvunitor (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b)

       (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b))
  • (internal_right_adj_counit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2)
     ▹ is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b))
 • lunitor (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b) =
 id₂ (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b)) 
  ?pr11

      
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_initial b
init:= pr1 Hb (pr1 T): Initial (hom (pr1 T) b)
l:= is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b: B ⟦ b, pr1 T ⟧
r:= pr1 init: B ⟦ pr1 T, b ⟧
η:= cocartesian_initial_to_cocartesian_initial_via_adj_unit: id₁ (pr1 T) ==> r · l
ε:= cocartesian_initial_to_cocartesian_initial_via_adj_counit: l · r ==> id₁ b
B ⟦ pr1 T, b ⟧
 exact r.
      
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_initial b
init:= pr1 Hb (pr1 T): Initial (hom (pr1 T) b)

id₁ (pr1 T) ==>
r · is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b
 exact η.

T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_initial b

(λ _ : id₁ (pr1 T) ==>
       r · is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b,
 is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b · r ==> id₁ b) η
 exact ε.
      
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_initial b
init:= pr1 Hb (pr1 T): Initial (hom (pr1 T) b)
l:= is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b: B ⟦ b, pr1 T ⟧

ε:= cocartesian_initial_to_cocartesian_initial_via_adj_counit: l · r ==> id₁ b
(((linvunitor
     (internal_right_adj_left_adjoint (r,, η,, ε))
   • (internal_right_adj_unit (r,, η,, ε)
      ▹ internal_right_adj_left_adjoint (r,, η,, ε)))
  • rassociator

• runitor
    (internal_right_adj_left_adjoint (r,, η,, ε)) =
id₂ (internal_right_adj_left_adjoint (r,, η,, ε))
 apply (@InitialArrowEq _ init).

T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_initial b
init:= pr1 Hb (pr1 T): Initial (hom (pr1 T) b)
l:= is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b: B ⟦ b, pr1 T ⟧
r:= pr1 init: B ⟦ pr1 T, b ⟧
η:= cocartesian_initial_to_cocartesian_initial_via_adj_unit: id₁ (pr1 T) ==> r · l
ε:= cocartesian_initial_to_cocartesian_initial_via_adj_counit: l · r ==> id₁ b
(λ _ : (((linvunitor
            (internal_right_adj_left_adjoint
               (r,, η,, ε))
          • (internal_right_adj_unit (r,, η,, ε)
             ▹ internal_right_adj_left_adjoint
                 (r,, η,, ε)))
         • rassociator

                (r,, η,, ε))

 (((rinvunitor (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b)
    • (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b
       ◃ internal_right_adj_unit (r,, η,, ε)))
   • lassociator (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b)
       (internal_right_adj_left_adjoint (r,, η,, ε))
       (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b))
  • (internal_right_adj_counit (r,, η,, ε)
     ▹ is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b))
 • lunitor (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b) =
 id₂ (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b))
  (InitialArrowEq
     ((((linvunitor
           (internal_right_adj_left_adjoint
              (r,, η,, ε))
         • (internal_right_adj_unit (r,, η,, ε)
            ▹ internal_right_adj_left_adjoint
                (r,, η,, ε)))
        • rassociator
            (internal_right_adj_left_adjoint
               (r,, η,, ε))
            (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b)
            (internal_right_adj_left_adjoint
               (r,, η,, ε)))
       • (internal_right_adj_left_adjoint (r,, η,, ε)
          ◃ internal_right_adj_counit (r,, η,, ε)))
      • runitor
          (internal_right_adj_left_adjoint (r,, η,, ε)))
     (id₂
        (internal_right_adj_left_adjoint (r,, η,, ε))))
 apply (is_bifinal_eq_property (pr2 T)).
    Defined.
  End ToAdj.

  Section FromAdj.
    Context (Hb : cocartesian_initial_via_adj b T).

    Let r : b --> pr1 T := is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b.
    Let l : pr1 T --> b := pr11 Hb.
    Let η : id₁ (pr1 T) ==> l · r := pr121 Hb.
    Let ε : r · l ==> id₁ b := pr221 Hb.
    Let p
      : linvunitor l • (η ▹ l) • rassociator l r l • (l ◃ ε) • runitor l
        =
        id₂ l
        := pr12 Hb.

    Definition cocartesian_initial_via_adj_to_cocartesian_initial_1cell
               (x : B)
      : x --> b
      := is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) x · l.

    Definition cocartesian_initial_via_adj_to_cocartesian_initial_2cell
               (x : B)
               (f : x --> b)
      : cocartesian_initial_via_adj_to_cocartesian_initial_1cell x ==> f
      := (is_bifinal_2cell_property (pr2 T) _ _ _ ▹ l)
         • rassociator _ _ _
         • (_ ◃ ε)
         • runitor _.

l:= pr11 Hb: B ⟦ pr1 T, b ⟧
η:= pr121 Hb: id₁ (pr1 T) ==> l · r
ε:= pr221 Hb: r · l ==> id₁ b
p:= pr12 Hb: (((linvunitor l • (η ▹ l)) • rassociator l r l)
 • (l ◃ ε)) • runitor l = 
id₂ l
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
isaprop
  (cocartesian_initial_via_adj_to_cocartesian_initial_1cell
     x ==> f)

         • (lassociator
              (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) x) l
              (id₁ b) • ((α ▹ id₁ b) • runitor f))))) =
(is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) x ◃ linvunitor l)
• ((is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) x ◃ (η ▹ l))
   • ((is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) x
       ◃ rassociator l r l)

η:= pr121 Hb: id₁ (pr1 T) ==> l · r
ε:= pr221 Hb: r · l ==> id₁ b
p:= pr12 Hb: (((linvunitor l • (η ▹ l)) • rassociator l r l)
 • (l ◃ ε)) • runitor l = 
id₂ l
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
z_iso
  (cocartesian_initial_via_adj_to_cocartesian_initial_obj
     x)
  (pre_comp b f
     (cocartesian_initial_via_adj_to_cocartesian_initial_obj
        y))

T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_initial_via_adj b T
r:= is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b: B ⟦ b, pr1 T ⟧
l:= pr11 Hb: B ⟦ pr1 T, b ⟧
η:= pr121 Hb: id₁ (pr1 T) ==> l · r
ε:= pr221 Hb: r · l ==> id₁ b
p:= pr12 Hb: (((linvunitor l • (η ▹ l)) • rassociator l r l)
 • (l ◃ ε)) • runitor l = 
id₂ l
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
invertible_2cell
  (cocartesian_initial_via_adj_to_cocartesian_initial_obj
     x)
  (pre_comp b f
     (cocartesian_initial_via_adj_to_cocartesian_initial_obj
        y))

 • (l ◃ ε)) • runitor l =

invertible_2cell (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) x)
  (f · is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) y)

        apply (is_bifinal_invertible_2cell_property (pr2 T)).

  End FromAdj.

  Defined.

  Section ToAdj.
    Context (Hb : cocartesian_coprod b).

    Let δ : b --> pr1 (prod b b)
      := binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b).

    Let coproduct
      : @BinCoproduct
          (hom (pr1 (prod b b)) b)
          (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
          (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
      := pr1 Hb (pr1 (prod b b))
                (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
                (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))).

    Let r : pr1 (prod b b) --> b
      := BinCoproductObject coproduct.

    
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_coprod b
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
coproduct:= pr1 Hb (pr1 (prod b b))
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinCoproduct
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
r:= coproduct: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ

    
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_coprod b
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
coproduct:= pr1 Hb (pr1 (prod b b))
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinCoproduct
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
r:= coproduct: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ

T: bifinal_obj B

b: B

coproduct:= pr1 Hb (pr1 (prod b b))
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinCoproduct
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
r:= coproduct: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
id₁ (pr1 (prod b b))
· binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)) ==>
r · δ · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b))

T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B

  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinCoproduct
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))

id₁ (pr1 (prod b b))
· binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)) ==>
r · δ · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))

      
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_coprod b
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
coproduct:= pr1 Hb (pr1 (prod b b))
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinCoproduct
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
r:= coproduct: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
id₁ (pr1 (prod b b))
· binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)) ==>
r · δ · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b))
 exact (lunitor _
               • BinCoproductIn1 coproduct
               • rinvunitor _
               • (r ◃ (binprod_ump_1cell_pr1 (pr2 (prod b b)) _ (id₁ b) (id₁ b))^-1)
               • lassociator _ _ _).
      
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_coprod b
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧

  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinCoproduct
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
r:= coproduct: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
id₁ (pr1 (prod b b))
· binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)) ==>
r · δ · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))
 exact (lunitor _
               • BinCoproductIn2 coproduct
               • rinvunitor _
               • (r ◃ (binprod_ump_1cell_pr2 (pr2 (prod b b)) _ (id₁ b) (id₁ b))^-1)
               • lassociator _ _ _).
    Defined.

    Let η : id₁ _ ==> r · δ
      := cocartesian_coprod_to_cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_unit.

 exact (binprod_ump_1cell_pr2 (pr2 (prod b b)) _ (id₁ b) (id₁ b)).
    Defined.

    Let ε : δ · r ==> id₁ _
      := cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit.

    
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_coprod b
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
coproduct:= pr1 Hb (pr1 (prod b b))
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinCoproduct
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
r:= coproduct: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= cocartesian_coprod_to_cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_unit: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: δ · r ==> id₁ b
(((linvunitor r • (η ▹ r)) • rassociator r δ r)
 • (r ◃ ε)) • runitor r = id₂ r

    
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B

b: B

ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: δ · r ==> id₁ b
(((linvunitor r • (η ▹ r)) • rassociator r δ r)
 • (r ◃ ε)) • runitor r = id₂ r

      
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B

BinCoproductIn1 coproduct
• ((((linvunitor r • (η ▹ r)) • rassociator r δ r)
    • (r ◃ ε)) • runitor r) =
BinCoproductIn1 coproduct • id₂ r
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B

b: B

  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))

BinCoproductIn2 coproduct
• ((((linvunitor r • (η ▹ r)) • rassociator r δ r)
    • (r ◃ ε)) • runitor r) =
BinCoproductIn2 coproduct • id₂ r

      
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_coprod b

  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinCoproduct
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))

η:= cocartesian_coprod_to_cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_unit: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: δ · r ==> id₁ b
BinCoproductIn1 coproduct
• ((((linvunitor r • (η ▹ r)) • rassociator r δ r)
    • (r ◃ ε)) • runitor r) =
BinCoproductIn1 coproduct • id₂ r
 
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_coprod b
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
coproduct:= pr1 Hb (pr1 (prod b b))
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinCoproduct
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
r:= coproduct: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= cocartesian_coprod_to_cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_unit: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: δ · r ==> id₁ b
((((BinCoproductIn1 coproduct • linvunitor r)
   • (η ▹ r)) • rassociator r δ r) • (r ◃ ε))
• runitor r = BinCoproductIn1 coproduct • id₂ r

          apply (BinCoproductIn1Commutes
                   _ _ _
                   (make_BinCoproduct
                      _ _ _ _ _ _
                      (pr2 Hb _ _ δ _ _ _ _ _ (pr2 coproduct)))).

ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: δ · r ==> id₁ b
rinvunitor coproduct
• ((r
    ◃ (binprod_ump_1cell_pr1 (pr2 (prod b b)) b
         (id₁ b) (id₁ b)) ^-1)
   • ((r
       ◃ binprod_ump_1cell_pr1 (pr2 (prod b b)) b
           (id₁ b) (id₁ b)) • runitor r)) = ?b

          
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_coprod b
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
coproduct:= pr1 Hb (pr1 (prod b b))
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinCoproduct
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
r:= coproduct: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= cocartesian_coprod_to_cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_unit: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: δ · r ==> id₁ b
(r
 ◃ (binprod_ump_1cell_pr1 (pr2 (prod b b)) b (id₁ b)
      (id₁ b)) ^-1)
• ((r
    ◃ binprod_ump_1cell_pr1 (pr2 (prod b b)) b (id₁ b)
        (id₁ b)) • runitor r) = ?t2

id₂ (r · id₁ b) • runitor r = ?t2

          apply id2_left.
        
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_coprod b
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
coproduct:= pr1 Hb (pr1 (prod b b))
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinCoproduct
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))

η:= cocartesian_coprod_to_cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_unit: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: δ · r ==> id₁ b
rinvunitor coproduct • runitor r = id₂ r

        apply rinvunitor_runitor.
      
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_coprod b
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧

  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))

  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))

η:= cocartesian_coprod_to_cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_unit: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: δ · r ==> id₁ b
BinCoproductIn2 coproduct
• ((((linvunitor r • (η ▹ r)) • rassociator r δ r)
    • (r ◃ ε)) • runitor r) =
BinCoproductIn2 coproduct • id₂ r

((((BinCoproductIn2 coproduct • linvunitor r)
   • (η ▹ r)) • rassociator r δ r) • (r ◃ ε))
• runitor r = BinCoproductIn2 coproduct • id₂ r

b: B

((r ◃ (δ ◃ BinCoproductIn2 coproduct)) • (r ◃ ε))
• runitor r = ?t2

  (binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
• (rassociator r δ (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
   • ((r
       ◃ binprod_ump_1cell_pr2 (pr2 (prod b b)) b
           (id₁ b) (id₁ b)) • runitor r)) = ?t2

          
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_coprod b
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
coproduct:= pr1 Hb (pr1 (prod b b))
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinCoproduct
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
r:= coproduct: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= cocartesian_coprod_to_cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_unit: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: δ · r ==> id₁ b
((lassociator r
    (binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b)
       (id₁ b)) (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  • rassociator r δ
      (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))))
 • (r
    ◃ binprod_ump_1cell_pr2 (pr2 (prod b b)) b (id₁ b)
        (id₁ b))) • runitor r = ?t2

(id₂ (r · (δ · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))))
 • (r

        (id₁ b))) • runitor r = ?t2

B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B

  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))

  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))

η:= cocartesian_coprod_to_cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_unit: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: δ · r ==> id₁ b
id₂ (r · id₁ b) • runitor r = ?t2

          apply id2_left.
        
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_coprod b
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
coproduct:= pr1 Hb (pr1 (prod b b))
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinCoproduct
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
r:= coproduct: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= cocartesian_coprod_to_cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_unit: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: δ · r ==> id₁ b
rinvunitor coproduct • runitor r = id₂ r

        apply rinvunitor_runitor.
    Qed.

    
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_coprod b
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
coproduct:= pr1 Hb (pr1 (prod b b))
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinCoproduct
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
r:= coproduct: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= cocartesian_coprod_to_cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_unit: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: δ · r ==> id₁ b
(((rinvunitor δ • (δ ◃ η)) • lassociator δ r δ)
 • (ε ▹ δ)) • lunitor δ = id₂ δ

T: bifinal_obj B

(((rinvunitor δ • (δ ◃ η)) • lassociator δ r δ)
 • (ε ▹ δ)) • lunitor δ = id₂ δ

      
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_coprod b
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
coproduct:= pr1 Hb (pr1 (prod b b))
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinCoproduct
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
r:= coproduct: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= cocartesian_coprod_to_cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_unit: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: δ · r ==> id₁ b
((((rinvunitor δ • (δ ◃ η)) • lassociator δ r δ)
  • (ε ▹ δ)) • lunitor δ)
▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)) =
id₂ δ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b))

b: B
Hb: cocartesian_coprod b
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
coproduct:= pr1 Hb (pr1 (prod b b))
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinCoproduct
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
r:= coproduct: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= cocartesian_coprod_to_cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_unit: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: δ · r ==> id₁ b
((((rinvunitor δ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
   • ((δ ◃ η) ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b))))
  • (lassociator δ r δ
     ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b))))
 • ((ε ▹ δ) ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b))))
• (lunitor δ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b))) = 
?b

b: B

  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))

ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: δ · r ==> id₁ b
lunitor δ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)) = ?t2

r:= coproduct: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= cocartesian_coprod_to_cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_unit: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: δ · r ==> id₁ b
((id₂ (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  ⋆⋆ lassociator δ r δ
  • rassociator (δ · r) δ
      (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b))))
 • id₂ (δ · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b))) ⋆⋆ ε)
• lunitor (δ · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b))) =
?t2

Hb: cocartesian_coprod b
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
coproduct:= pr1 Hb (pr1 (prod b b))
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinCoproduct
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
r:= coproduct: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= cocartesian_coprod_to_cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_unit: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: δ · r ==> id₁ b
(δ ◃ linvunitor (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b))))
• ((δ ◃ (η ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b))))
   • ((δ
       ◃ rassociator r δ
           (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b))))
      • (lassociator δ r
           (δ · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
         • ((ε ▹ δ · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
            • lunitor
                (δ · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b))))))) =
?b

Hb: cocartesian_coprod b
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
coproduct:= pr1 Hb (pr1 (prod b b))
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinCoproduct
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
r:= coproduct: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= cocartesian_coprod_to_cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_unit: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: δ · r ==> id₁ b
?b = id₂ (δ · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))

?b

  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinCoproduct
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
r:= coproduct: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= cocartesian_coprod_to_cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_unit: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: δ · r ==> id₁ b
rinvunitor (id₁ b)
• (lunitor (id₁ b)
   • (binprod_ump_1cell_pr1 (pr2 (prod b b)) b (id₁ b)
        (id₁ b)) ^-1) = ?t2

B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_coprod b
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
coproduct:= pr1 Hb (pr1 (prod b b))
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinCoproduct
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
r:= coproduct: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= cocartesian_coprod_to_cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_unit: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: δ · r ==> id₁ b
((((rinvunitor δ • (δ ◃ η)) • lassociator δ r δ)
  • (ε ▹ δ)) • lunitor δ)
▹ binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)) =
id₂ δ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))

  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
r:= coproduct: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= cocartesian_coprod_to_cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_unit: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: δ · r ==> id₁ b
((((rinvunitor δ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
   • ((δ ◃ η) ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))))
  • (lassociator δ r δ
     ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))))
 • ((ε ▹ δ) ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))))
• (rassociator (id₁ b) δ
     (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
   • lunitor (δ · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))) =
id₂ (δ · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))

ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: δ · r ==> id₁ b

      • lunitor
          (δ · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))))) =
?t2

b: B

  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinCoproduct
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))

ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: δ · r ==> id₁ b
(δ · r
 ◃ (binprod_ump_1cell_pr2 (pr2 (prod b b)) b (id₁ b)
      (id₁ b)) ^-1)
• ((ε ▹ δ · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
   • lunitor (δ · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))) =
?t2

• (binprod_ump_1cell_pr2 (pr2 (prod b b)) b (id₁ b)
     (id₁ b)) ^-1 = ?b

    Defined.
  End ToAdj.

  Section FromAdj.
    Context (Hb : cocartesian_coprod_via_adj b prod).

    Let δ : b --> pr1 (prod b b)
      := binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b).
    Let r : pr1 (prod b b) --> b := pr11 Hb.
    Let η : id₁ _ ==> r · δ := pr121 Hb.
    Let ε : δ · r ==> id₁ _ := pr221 Hb.
    Let p : linvunitor r • (η ▹ r) • rassociator r δ r • (r ◃ ε) • runitor r
            =
            id2 r
      := pr12 Hb.

    Local Definition cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_1cell
                     {x : B}
                     (f g : x --> b)
      : x --> b
      := binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) f g · r.

    Local Definition cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_in1_help
      : binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r
      := linvunitor _
         • (η ▹ _)
         • rassociator _ _ _
         • (r ◃ (binprod_ump_1cell_pr1 (pr2 (prod b b)) _ (id₁ b) (id₁ b)))
         • runitor _.

    Local Definition cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_in1
                     {x : B}
                     (f g : x --> b)
      : f ==> cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_1cell f g
      := (binprod_ump_1cell_pr1 (pr2 (prod b b)) _ f g)^-1
         • (_ ◃ cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_in1_help).

    Local Definition cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_in2_help
      : binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r
      := linvunitor _
         • (η ▹ _)
         • rassociator _ _ _
         • (r ◃ (binprod_ump_1cell_pr2 (pr2 (prod b b)) _ (id₁ b) (id₁ b)))
         • runitor _.

    Local Definition cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_in2
                     {x : B}
                     (f g : x --> b)
      : g ==> cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_1cell f g
      := (binprod_ump_1cell_pr2 (pr2 (prod b b)) _ f g)^-1
         • (_ ◃ cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_in2_help).

    
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_coprod_via_adj b prod
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
r:= pr11 Hb: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= pr121 Hb: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= pr221 Hb: δ · r ==> id₁ b
p:= pr12 Hb: (((linvunitor r • (η ▹ r)) • rassociator r δ r)

r:= pr11 Hb: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= pr121 Hb: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= pr221 Hb: δ · r ==> id₁ b
p:= pr12 Hb: (((linvunitor r • (η ▹ r)) • rassociator r δ r)
 • (r ◃ ε)) • runitor r = 
id₂ r
x: B
f, g, k: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
α: f ==> k
β: g ==> k
rassociator δ r (id₁ b) • ((δ ◃ runitor r) • ε) = ?t2

    (id₁ b)) ^-1
 • (δ
    ◃ cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_in2_help))
• ε = id₂ (id₁ b)

 • (r ◃ ε)) • runitor r = 
id₂ r
x: B

β: g ==> k

 • (r ◃ ε)) • runitor r =

prod: has_binprod B
b: B

ε:= pr221 Hb: δ · r ==> id₁ b

 • (r ◃ ε)) • runitor r = 
id₂ r

(rassociator (δ · r) δ
   (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
 • (ε ▹ δ · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))))

 • (r ◃ ε)) • runitor r = 
id₂ r

η:= pr121 Hb: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= pr221 Hb: δ · r ==> id₁ b
p:= pr12 Hb: (((linvunitor r • (η ▹ r)) • rassociator r δ r)
 • (r ◃ ε)) • runitor r = 
id₂ r
x: B
f, g, k: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
α: f ==> k
β: g ==> k
φ: ∑
fg : cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_1cell
       f g ==> k,
cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_in1

× cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_in2
    f g • fg = β
(((((binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) f g
     ◃ linvunitor r)
    • (binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) f g
       ◃ (η ▹ r)))
   • (binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) f g
      ◃ rassociator r δ r))
  • lassociator
      (binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) f g) r
      (δ · r)) • (pr1 φ ▹ δ · r)) • (k ◃ ε) =
((binprod_ump_2cell (pr2 (prod b b))
    ((((binprod_ump_1cell_pr1 (pr2 (prod b b)) x f g
        • α) • rinvunitor k)
      • (k
         ◃ (binprod_ump_1cell_pr1 (pr2 (prod b b)) b
              (id₁ b) (id₁ b)) ^-1))
     • lassociator k
         (binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b)
            (id₁ b))
         (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b))))
    ((((binprod_ump_1cell_pr2 (pr2 (prod b b)) x f g
        • β) • rinvunitor k)
      • (k
         ◃ (binprod_ump_1cell_pr2 (pr2 (prod b b)) b
              (id₁ b) (id₁ b)) ^-1))
     • lassociator k
         (binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b)
            (id₁ b))
         (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))) ▹ r)
 • rassociator k δ r) • (k ◃ ε)

r:= pr11 Hb: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= pr121 Hb: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= pr221 Hb: δ · r ==> id₁ b
p:= pr12 Hb: (((linvunitor r • (η ▹ r)) • rassociator r δ r)
 • (r ◃ ε)) • runitor r = 
id₂ r
x: B
f, g, k: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
α: f ==> k
β: g ==> k
φ: ∑
fg : cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_1cell
       f g ==> k,
cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_in1
  f g • fg = α
× cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_in2
    f g • fg = β
((id₂ r
  ⋆⋆ rinvunitor
       (binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) f g)
  • (η ⋆⋆ id₂ (binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) f g)
     ▹ r))
 • (lassociator
      (binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) f g) r δ ▹ r))
• ((pr1 φ ▹ δ) ▹ r) = ?b

ε:= pr221 Hb: δ · r ==> id₁ b
p:= pr12 Hb: (((linvunitor r • (η ▹ r)) • rassociator r δ r)
 • (r ◃ ε)) • runitor r = 
id₂ r

r:= pr11 Hb: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= pr121 Hb: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= pr221 Hb: δ · r ==> id₁ b
p:= pr12 Hb: (((linvunitor r • (η ▹ r)) • rassociator r δ r)
 • (r ◃ ε)) • runitor r = 
id₂ r

  (δ · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))

  (cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_1cell
     f g)
  (cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_in1
     f g)
  (cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_in2
     f g)
 
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_coprod_via_adj b prod
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
r:= pr11 Hb: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= pr121 Hb: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= pr221 Hb: δ · r ==> id₁ b
p:= pr12 Hb: (((linvunitor r • (η ▹ r)) • rassociator r δ r)
 • (r ◃ ε)) • runitor r = 
id₂ r
x: B
f, g, k: hom x b
α: hom x b ⟦ f, k ⟧
β: hom x b ⟦ g, k ⟧
∃! fg : hom x b
        ⟦ cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_1cell
            f g, k ⟧,
cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_in1 f
  g · fg = α
× cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_in2
    f g · fg = β

        
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_coprod_via_adj b prod
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
r:= pr11 Hb: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= pr121 Hb: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= pr221 Hb: δ · r ==> id₁ b
p:= pr12 Hb: (((linvunitor r • (η ▹ r)) • rassociator r δ r)
 • (r ◃ ε)) • runitor r = 
id₂ r
x: B
f, g, k: hom x b
α: hom x b ⟦ f, k ⟧
β: hom x b ⟦ g, k ⟧
∑
fg : hom x b
     ⟦ cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_1cell
         f g, k ⟧,
cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_in1 f
  g · fg = α
× cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_in2
    f g · fg = β
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_coprod_via_adj b prod
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
r:= pr11 Hb: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧

p:= pr12 Hb: (((linvunitor r • (η ▹ r)) • rassociator r δ r)
 • (r ◃ ε)) • runitor r = 
id₂ r
x: B
f, g, k: hom x b
α: hom x b ⟦ f, k ⟧
β: hom x b ⟦ g, k ⟧
∏
t : ∑
    fg : hom x b
         ⟦ cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_1cell
             f g, k ⟧,
    cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_in1
      f g · fg = α
    × cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_in2
        f g · fg = β, t = ?x

(λ _ : cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_in1
         f g
       · cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_2cell

        f g · fg = β,
t =
cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_2cell
  α β,,

cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_2cell_in2

 apply cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_eq.
    Defined.

T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_coprod_via_adj b prod
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧

 • (r ◃ ε)) • runitor r = 
id₂ r
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
invertible_2cell
  (f
   · cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_1cell
       h₁ h₂)
  (cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_1cell
     (f · h₁) (f · h₂))

b: B

δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧

η:= pr121 Hb: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ

 • (r ◃ ε)) • runitor r = 
id₂ r

f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
f · binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) h₁ h₂
· binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)) ==>
binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (f · h₁) (f · h₂)
· binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b))
 exact (rassociator _ _ _
                 • (_ ◃ binprod_ump_1cell_pr1 (pr2 (prod b b)) _ h₁ h₂)
                 • (binprod_ump_1cell_pr1 (pr2 (prod b b)) _ _ _)^-1).
        
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_coprod_via_adj b prod
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
r:= pr11 Hb: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= pr121 Hb: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= pr221 Hb: δ · r ==> id₁ b
p:= pr12 Hb: (((linvunitor r • (η ▹ r)) • rassociator r δ r)
 • (r ◃ ε)) • runitor r = 
id₂ r
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
f · binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) h₁ h₂
· binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)) ==>
binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (f · h₁) (f · h₂)
· binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))
 exact (rassociator _ _ _
                 • (_ ◃ binprod_ump_1cell_pr2 (pr2 (prod b b)) _ h₁ h₂)
                 • (binprod_ump_1cell_pr2 (pr2 (prod b b)) _ _ _)^-1).
      
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_coprod_via_adj b prod
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
r:= pr11 Hb: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= pr121 Hb: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= pr221 Hb: δ · r ==> id₁ b
p:= pr12 Hb: (((linvunitor r • (η ▹ r)) • rassociator r δ r)
 • (r ◃ ε)) • runitor r = 
id₂ r
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (binprod_ump_2cell (pr2 (prod b b))
     ((rassociator f
         (binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) h₁ h₂)
         (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
       • (f
          ◃ binprod_ump_1cell_pr1 (pr2 (prod b b)) y
              h₁ h₂))
      • (binprod_ump_1cell_pr1 (pr2 (prod b b)) x
           (f · h₁) (f · h₂)) ^-1)
     ((rassociator f
         (binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) h₁ h₂)
         (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
       • (f
          ◃ binprod_ump_1cell_pr2 (pr2 (prod b b)) y
              h₁ h₂))
      • (binprod_ump_1cell_pr2 (pr2 (prod b b)) x
           (f · h₁) (f · h₂)) ^-1))
 
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_coprod_via_adj b prod
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
r:= pr11 Hb: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= pr121 Hb: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= pr221 Hb: δ · r ==> id₁ b
p:= pr12 Hb: (((linvunitor r • (η ▹ r)) • rassociator r δ r)
 • (r ◃ ε)) • runitor r = 
id₂ r
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  ((rassociator f
      (binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) h₁ h₂)
      (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
    • (f
       ◃ binprod_ump_1cell_pr1 (pr2 (prod b b)) y h₁
           h₂))
   • (binprod_ump_1cell_pr1 (pr2 (prod b b)) x
        (f · h₁) (f · h₂)) ^-1)

T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B

x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₁, h₂: hom y b
isBinCoproduct (hom x b) (pre_comp b f h₁)
  (pre_comp b f h₂)
  (pre_comp b f
     (cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_obj
        y h₁ h₂))
  (# (pre_comp b f)
     (BinCoproductIn1
        (cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_obj
           y h₁ h₂)))
  (# (pre_comp b f)
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_obj
           y h₁ h₂)))

     x (f · h₁) (f · h₂))
· z_iso_inv_from_z_iso

# (pre_comp b f)
  (BinCoproductIn1
     (cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_obj
        y h₁ h₂))

cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_in1
  (f · h₁) (f · h₂)
• ((binprod_ump_2cell (pr2 (prod b b))
      (binprod_ump_1cell_pr1 (pr2 (prod b b)) x
         (f · h₁) (f · h₂)
       • ((f
           ◃ (binprod_ump_1cell_pr1 (pr2 (prod b b)) y
                h₁ h₂) ^-1)
          • lassociator f
              (binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) h₁
                 h₂)
              (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))))
      (binprod_ump_1cell_pr2 (pr2 (prod b b)) x
         (f · h₁) (f · h₂)
       • ((f
           ◃ (binprod_ump_1cell_pr2 (pr2 (prod b b)) y
                h₁ h₂) ^-1)
          • lassociator f
              (binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) h₁
                 h₂)
              (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))))
    ▹ r)
   • rassociator f
       (binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) h₁ h₂) r) =
f
◃ cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_in1
    h₁ h₂

f

       ▹ r)
      • rassociator f
          (binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) h₁ h₂) r)) =
?b

B: bicat

prod: has_binprod B
b: B

 • (r ◃ ε)) • runitor r =

B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_coprod_via_adj b prod
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
r:= pr11 Hb: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= pr121 Hb: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= pr221 Hb: δ · r ==> id₁ b
p:= pr12 Hb: (((linvunitor r • (η ▹ r)) • rassociator r δ r)
 • (r ◃ ε)) • runitor r = 
id₂ r
∏ (x y : B) (f : B ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (pre_comp b f)

      
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_coprod_via_adj b prod
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
r:= pr11 Hb: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= pr121 Hb: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= pr221 Hb: δ · r ==> id₁ b
p:= pr12 Hb: (((linvunitor r • (η ▹ r)) • rassociator r δ r)
 • (r ◃ ε)) • runitor r = 
id₂ r
∏ x : B, BinCoproducts (hom x b)
 exact cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_obj.
      
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cocartesian_coprod_via_adj b prod
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
r:= pr11 Hb: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= pr121 Hb: id₁ (pr1 (prod b b)) ==> r · δ
ε:= pr221 Hb: δ · r ==> id₁ b
p:= pr12 Hb: (((linvunitor r • (η ▹ r)) • rassociator r δ r)
 • (r ◃ ε)) • runitor r = 
id₂ r
∏ (x y : B) (f : B ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_bincoproduct (pre_comp b f)
 exact @cocartesian_coprod_via_adj_to_cocartesian_coprod_preserves.
    Defined.
  End FromAdj.

  
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B

cocartesian_coprod b
